Name: Durability_Map
Description: The time, in days, since the intervention was distributed and a multiplier for the **Initial_Effect**.

Name: Expire_At_Durability_Map_End
Description: Set to 1 to let the intervention expire when the end of the map is reached.

Name: Initial_Effect
Description: The multiplier used to define the magnitude of the shape of the curve, as specified when using the parameters with the **WaningEffectMapLinear** class.

Name: Reference_Timer
Description: The timestamp at which linear-map should be anchored.

Name: Values
Description: An array of values to match the defined **Times**.
